title: Filipino Falafel Wrap
description: A crispy and tangy twist on traditional falafel, wrapped in a delicious Filipino-style wrap. This flavorful dish combines the best of both cuisines for a unique culinary experience.

ingredients.name: Filipino-style wrap
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian markets or online

instructions: 1. Cook the falafel according to package instructions.
2. Warm the Filipino-style wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
3. Assemble the wrap by placing 2 falafel pieces on the bottom half of the wrap.
4. Add 1/4 cup of tangy slaw on top of the falafel.
5. Add 1/4 cup of cucumber and tomato slices on top of the slaw.
6. Add 1-2 pickle slices on top of the vegetables.
7. Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
8. Repeat with the remaining wraps and filling ingredients.
